name: core.openwop.workflows.finance
description: Real-work workflow pack (RFC 0013, ADR 0149) — the Finance cluster: Invoice → AP Processing, Month-End Close Checklist, and Expense/Budget Approval + anomaly detection. Reasons with core.ai.chatCompletion; binds the ERP (NetSuite) via core.openwop.http.openapi-call connectionRef for validation + posting; every posting/reimbursement runs through a threshold core.chat.approvalGate. All tenant-specific values are run parameters (replay-deterministic). Resolves on hosts shipping the http + ai + chat + kb + integration packs. Published under core.openwop.workflows.* (openwop-team key).
author: openwop
